reviews.comment:
Shop siempre hay mucha gente en vacaciones y los empleados no llegan a mantener la limpieza.
Los baños en cambio siempre muy limpios.
Y el lugar súper recomendable para tomar un descanso en media de la naturaleza .

(Translated by Google)
The shop is always crowded on vacation, and the employees don't keep up with the cleanliness.
The bathrooms, on the other hand, are always very clean.
And it's a highly recommended place to take a break surrounded by nature.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwNGJuM0NnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
El predio es grande, para mí mascota genial, cuándo vuelvo de MDQ es la parada fija, todo prolijo, limpio y la full con comida variada y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
The place is large, great for my pet, when I come back from MDQ it's a regular stop, everything is neat, clean and full of varied food and good service.

reviews.comment:
La mejor atención de los playeros,baños limpios, a mejorar la lentitud dentro de la misma, para comprar un café estube 20 minutos .

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were the best, the bathrooms were clean, but the service inside the beach needs improvement; it took me 20 minutes to buy a coffee.
